data.name: 末代君主
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


關於此遊戲







Last Devil是一款Roguelike動作射擊遊戲，您將扮演末代魔王來延續魔族的生存，您將親自出城踏上戰場尋找求生之路，運用【下半身】特殊的能力與魅力來擄獲不同種族、個性、癖好的助手來守護魔族。





【WASD】 上下左右
【F鍵】 互動/開啟
【LMB】 普通攻擊
【RMB】 使用技能
【Space】 使用衝刺技能
【E鍵】 使用夥伴技能
【P鍵】 自殺
【Q】 投擲
【滾輪】 切換道具
【TAB】 背包
【ESC】 選項設定







1.在冒險的路上有許多道具可以獲取，道具可疊加效果，增強你的攻擊方式與能力【組建你最喜歡的流派】。





2.流暢的打擊感，運用你的衝刺技能閃躲一切對你的攻擊，並給予反擊。



3.冒險的路上什麼事情都可能發生，有機會遇到不同類型的房間、事件、人物，藉由觸發特殊的互動，有機會讓你提升能力，但也可能讓你遭受詛咒。





4.與3位女主角有著曖昧且生動的故事，他們有什麼需求，或是你想對他做些什麼呢?等待您自行發掘。

5.當您通關後會開啟無限挑戰，將會有更加隨機的事情、更強大的怪物等著您。
【給予樂於挑戰極限的玩家們】

6.超豐富的遊戲場景，除了生動的畫面外，這些場景物件不僅可以拿來當掩護，甚至有些可以直接破壞，破壞後會掉落什麼呢?

data.supported_languages:
繁體中文*, 英文, 日文*, 簡體中文*, 韓文, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Intel Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: HD Intel Graphics
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Last Devil
data.detailed_description:
💟CHECK THIS OUT!💟


About the Game







Last Devil is a Roguelite action shooting game. You will play the role of the Last Devil, the savior of demons, responsible for the survival and continuation of the demon race. You will leave your castle bravely, and set foot on the battlefield to find your way to survive. Use your special abilities and charms of your lower body to capture different tribes, personalities and fetish traits to assist your character to protect the demons.





【WASD】 Up, Down, Left, Right
【F 】 Interact/Open
【LMB】 Normal Attack
【RMB】 Use Skill
【Space】 Use Dash Skill
【E 】 Use Companion Skill
【P 】 Suicide
【Q】 Throw
【Scroll Wheel】 Switch Items
【TAB】 Inventory
【ESC】 Options







1. You can get a lot of items, from which you can stack the buff, to upgrade your skills and abilities. 【Create your own builds】





2. Great and smooth combat. You can dodge all the attacks by using sprint and then perform a counterattack.



3. Anything could happen during the adventure. You might encounter various rooms, events and NPC which might increase your abilities or make you cursed by interacting with them.





4. Create an ambiguous and engaging story between three main characters. What request do they have ? or is there anything you would like to do with them? Explore it by yourself.

5. Activate Infinity challenge mode after completing campaign. There are more random events and enemies.【For gamers who like to challenge】

6. It has not only many different stages but also vivid graphics in the game. As you traverse the game’s environment, some of objects are interactive and destructible. You might get items from those destructible objects.

data.short_description: You are the Demon Lord Kuro on a mission to protect demonkind. Use your abilities and charms to capture and ensnare others. Tumble with different personalities and fetishes in this 2D rogue-lite shooter!
data.supported_languages:
Traditional Chinese*, English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean, Russian
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Intel Graphics
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7
  • Processor: Intel Core 2 Dual or AMD Equivalent
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: HD Intel Graphics
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
